commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

commit.message:
Update draft event visibility rules — creator and coverage area roles only

- Supplier Admin: all drafts unchanged
- Sales Manager / Territory Manager / Payroll Reviewer: drafts in coverage
  area + all admin drafts + any draft they created
- Ambassador Manager / Ambassador: only drafts they created (no longer see
  drafts just because they are assigned as ambassador or event manager)
- _can_view_drafts() now returns True for all roles since fine-grained draft
  filtering is handled entirely inside _get_visible_events()
- Updated test: after ambassador manager unreleases an event to Draft they
  did not create, use fetch_redirect_response=False since they can no longer
  access the detail page

commit.message:
Phase 1 terrain: adaptive LOD, hemisphere culling, colliders, skirts

Make the planet walkable:
- Adaptive resolution by depth (16x16 orbital → 128x128 ground), drops worst-case from ~50M to ~5M triangles
- Hemisphere culling via dot-product test, ~50% draw call reduction
- Trimesh colliders for depth >= 8 chunks so player doesn't fall through
- Skirt geometry on chunk boundaries to hide LOD transition cracks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: game-engine
repository.description: Bevy voxel planet simulation

commit.message:
Add whisper sync backend and protect extracted subtitles

- New whisper sync backend: uses whisper.cpp ASR to generate a reference
  SRT from the video audio, then aligns downloaded subtitles against it
  via alass. Handles large timing shifts (30-120s) that pure VAD
  approaches miss. Auto-selects model: base.en for English-only audio,
  small for multilingual/anime. Models download on first use.
- Pipeline fix: the run command now tracks subtitles freshly extracted
  from video tracks and skips download/sync for those languages, even
  when resync_mode is enabled. Extracted subs are already perfectly
  timed and should never be overwritten.
- Doctor checks for whisper dependencies (ffmpeg, alass, model status)
  when whisper backend is configured.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: library picker items not responding to clicks

The inline onclick with double-encoded JSON was breaking HTML attribute parsing
because the inner JSON string starts with `"`, terminating the onclick attribute
early. Replaced with event listeners attached after innerHTML update.

Also adds +N extras badge in picker grid for multi-image items.

- DELETE /api/employer/interviews/:id — cancel interview, sends cancellation email
- POST /api/employer/interviews/:id/resend-invite — resend original invite email

Fix install script: daemon-reload, persistenced, MIG enable, PREINIT

- Add systemctl daemon-reload after systemd-sysext merge so systemd
  sees the new services from the sysext
- Start nvidia-persistenced after sysext merge (provides GPU persistence mode)
- Enable MIG mode (nvidia-smi -mig 1) during install with reboot messaging
- Change init script registration from POSTINIT to PREINIT so the sysext
  reinstall runs before Docker and other services start
- Bump init script timeout from 10 to 30s for 500MB sysext copy

commit.message:
MAJOR SIMPLIFICATION: Return to MVP - Remove complexity, focus on value

USER FEEDBACK:
"The original assessment matrix was producing semi-valuable outputs. Through iterations,
we've drifted into something producing low-quality outputs, too long to click through,
too complex in both UX and codebase, with documents not legitimately valuable. We've
added complexity without increasing value."

GOAL:
Help consultants preparing BSR submissions answer 4 questions fast:
1. Where is this submission likely to be rejected?
2. What changes need to be made?
3. What requires human judgement?
4. How do I fix this before submitting to the regulator?

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WHAT WAS REMOVED (Complexity → Simplicity):

❌ DELETED: 1,911 lines of dead carousel code
   - CriterionCarousel.tsx (1,186 lines) - OLD, unused
   - GroupedReviewFlow.tsx (725 lines) - Replaced by SimpleResultsView

❌ REMOVED: "AI Can Fix" concept entirely
   - Accept/reject UI that did nothing
   - Broken proposed_change field
   - False expectations about AI document editing
   - Multi-step carousel flow (too many clicks)

❌ REMOVED: Multiple redundant document types
   - Full Assessment Report (long, buried insights)
   - Outstanding Issues Report (duplicate filtered version)
   - Executive Summary (redundant with main report)
   NOW: One clean compliance report

❌ MOVED: 11 test files from /services/ to /test/validation/
   - Cleaned up services directory
   - Proper organization

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WHAT WAS CREATED (Simple → Valuable):

✅ SimpleResultsView.tsx (300 lines)
   ONE screen showing everything:
   - Overall verdict: RED/AMBER/GREEN
   - Summary statistics (Critical/High/Medium/Low)
   - Issues grouped by responsible party
   - Expandable details
   - One "Download Report" button

   BEFORE: Summary → AI Groups → Human Summary → Generate (4+ screens)
   AFTER: Results → Download (1 screen)

✅ Simplified Compliance Report (ONE PDF)
   Structure:
   - Executive Summary with verdict
   - Critical Issues section (immediate action)
   - Issues grouped by responsible party
   - Clear action items with owner/effort

   Consultants get exactly what they need:
   - "15 critical issues will get you rejected"
   - "Here's what Fire Engineer needs to fix"
   - "Here are the quick wins"

   NOT: "Here's 40 pages with every check we ran"

✅ PDF Generation Utility (DRY)
   - pdf-generator.ts utility
   - Eliminates 4× duplicated Puppeteer code
   - Centralized PDF settings
   - generatePDFFromHTML() + streamPDFToResponse()

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

USER FLOW COMPARISON:

BEFORE (Complex, Slow):
1. Upload documents
2. Run assessment
3. Click "Start Review"
4. Summary screen (click)
5. AI Groups screen (click through 0-N items)
6. Human Summary screen (click)
7. Generate Documents button
8. Download 2 PDFs (Full + Outstanding)
Total: 7+ clicks, 2 documents, confusion about "AI can fix"

AFTER (Simple, Fast):
1. Upload documents
2. Run assessment
3. See results (RED/AMBER/GREEN verdict)
4. Download Compliance Report
Total: 2 clicks, 1 document, clear action items

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

TECHNICAL IMPROVEMENTS:

Backend:
+ New endpoint: /compliance-report/download (primary export)
+ Deprecated: /matrix-report/download/pdf (redirects to compliance)
+ generateComplianceReportHTML() - clean, actionable format
+ Consolidated PDF generation - no more copy-paste

Frontend:
+ SimpleResultsView component - single-screen results
+ Removed accept/reject UI (didn't work)
+ exportComplianceReport() - one export function
+ Removed complex categorization logic

Codebase Health:
+ Deleted 1,911 lines of dead code
+ Moved 11 test files to proper location
+ Eliminated PDF generation duplication
+ Removed broken "AI can fix" concept
+ TypeScript compiles cleanly

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

FILES CHANGED:

DELETED:
- packages/frontend/src/components/CriterionCarousel.tsx (1,186 lines)
- packages/frontend/src/components/GroupedReviewFlow.tsx (725 lines)

CREATED:
+ packages/frontend/src/components/SimpleResultsView.tsx (300 lines)
+ packages/backend/src/utils/pdf-generator.ts (utility)

MODIFIED:
~ packages/backend/src/routes/export.ts (added compliance report)
~ packages/frontend/src/pages/QuickAssess.tsx (use SimpleResultsView)
~ packages/frontend/src/services/exportService.ts (simplified exports)

MOVED:
→ 11 test-*.ts files: services/ → test/validation/

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

RESULT:

The product now delivers on its core value proposition:
✓ Fast: 2 clicks instead of 7+
✓ Clear: RED/AMBER/GREEN verdict upfront
✓ Actionable: Issues grouped by who fixes them
✓ Simple: One results screen, one report
✓ Maintainable: 1,900 lines of dead code removed
✓ Focused: Helps consultants avoid rejection

This is a true minimum viable product optimized for:
- Clarity of outputs
- Simplicity of UX
- Clear signposting of issues/actions
- Speed of review

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(e2e): eliminar pacientes duplicados y strict mode en selectores de paciente

- e2e-setup: borrar pacientes del usuario de test antes de cada run para
  evitar acumulación de duplicados que causan strict mode violations en
  Playwright (3 links 'Paciente E2E Playwright' → timeout de 15s en click)
- plan.spec.ts: navigateToPatient usa .first() como defensa adicional
- patient.spec.ts: .first() en los dos selectores de link de paciente
  (dashboard list y navegación a ficha para test de intake)

Root cause de plan tests 9-11: dashboard acumulaba N pacientes del mismo
nombre de runs anteriores → getByRole('link', { name }) con N matches →
Playwright reintenta hasta timeout (15s) esperando que quede exactamente 1

- include_tags/exclude_tags remain as legacy simple-list API

- expand_scenarios/run_feature flatten Rule blocks correctly

- New exports: Rule, FeatureChild, StarKeyword, TagExpr types, parse_tag_expr, eval_tag_expr, all_scenarios, top_level_scenarios, report_run_summary
- 252 tests passing

commit.message:
Enable data display outside market hours

Remove market-hours gates from all 3 fetch loops so data is always
available (after-hours, pre-market, weekends). Off-hours fetches use
10-min intervals (FETCH_INTERVAL_OFFHOURS) to save API quota. Gamma-0
guard preserved to prevent overwriting good data with zeros, with new
fallback to store zero data when no cache exists rather than showing
empty screen.

Fix exploding key_proj gradient + remove stale diagnostic

key_proj gradient was avg=5264, max=2.1M due to amplification through
cosine_sim → alpha → PFC → GRU chain over 20-step truncation windows.

Also removed misleading hippocampus gradient check from _log_hebbian_diagnostics
(it ran after zero_grad, always showed zero). Real gradient norms are
captured in _grad_accum after each backward pass.

commit.message:
feat(stagehand): add Notte fallback for bot-blocked domains

Adds a 2-tier scraping strategy: CF Browser Rendering first, then Notte
(residential proxies + antibot) when Vercel/Cloudflare security checkpoints
are detected. GovBase requests use notte_only=true to skip the browser.

- Add scrapeViaNotte() with metadata/briefing/full extraction
- Add isSecurityCheckpoint() detection for Vercel/CF bot walls
- Add notte_only query param to skip browser on known-blocked domains
- Update briefing endpoint to use notte_only=true for GovBase
- NOTTE_API_KEY set via wrangler secret (not committed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix address validation gate not respecting restored addresses

Two issues caused _addressValidated to get reset after being set
for restored addresses:
1. Input event listeners fired synchronously during value restore,
   clearing the flag before setTimeout could preserve it
2. Google Places autocomplete attachment could trigger input events
   on already-filled fields

Fixes:
- Use setTimeout(0) to set _addressValidated after all sync handlers
- Only reset _addressValidated on actual value changes, not no-op
  input events from programmatic dispatches
